assertions.expectation: Categorizes notifications by type: auto-upgrade scheduled, new version available, end-of-life/deprecation, security patch
assertions.reason: Response clearly categorizes all notification types with sections for 'Scheduled Auto-Upgrade Notifications', 'Version Availability Notifications', 'End of Support (EoS) Warnings', and 'Critical Security Patches'

assertions.expectation: Assigns urgency levels to each category (security patches = highest, new version available = lowest)
assertions.reason: Response assigns urgency levels with security patches and EoS warnings as 'URGENT', auto-upgrades as 'MEDIUM', and new version available as 'LOW/informational'

assertions.expectation: End-of-life warnings require action: plan upgrade before the support window closes
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states EoS warnings require 'Plan upgrade immediately' and provides specific commands and timelines for addressing end-of-support scenarios

assertions.expectation: Auto-upgrade scheduled notifications should trigger pre-upgrade checklist execution
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Prepare pre/post-upgrade checklists' for medium priority items and references runbooks with 'Full pre/post checklists' for scheduled upgrades

assertions.expectation: Security patch notifications may require expedited upgrades outside normal maintenance windows
assertions.reason: Response states security patches should be applied 'within 7-14 days' and classifies them as URGENT, implying they may override normal scheduling

assertions.expectation: New version available notifications are informational — use for planning, not immediate action
assertions.reason: Response explicitly categorizes version availability notifications as 'LOW - Informational/Long-term Planning' with 'No immediate action needed' and 'Use For: Long-term planning'

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting up Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts for GKE upgrade events
assertions.reason: Response includes a 'Cloud Monitoring Alerting Policy' section with specific gcloud commands for creating monitoring policies for GKE events

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE release notes as the source for understanding what changed in each version
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GKE release notes as a source for understanding version changes, though it provides comprehensive upgrade guidance otherwise
